events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana across Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. Currently in Japan enjoying onsen activities. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses during the trip.
events.hook: Finalize eyeglasses store locations in Kyoto, plan remaining activities in Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
